text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I really thought I would win this time... And after
all those long hours of training...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
choice_data_list: Even if it's gradual, you're still making progress.
Let's just focus on the day you do win!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
You're right. I've noticed my improvement during
training, and I'm definitely performing better than
I did in my first race...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'll be okay now! Even if it's slow, I know I'm still
making progress, little by little!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'll work even harder starting today. I'm counting
on your guidance!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Feeling sorry for myself isn't going to help me
improve. I have to keep running and have faith
that I'll win someday!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Trainer! I'm ready to get back to work!
